verification_notes: DOI:DOI does not resolve (404). The actual Hassan et al. 2013 pelN paper is 10.1128/jb.02118-12. Citation is wrong. | UniProt:E0SJQ8 = pelZ / Dda3937_04191 (NOT pelN). The true pelN is Dda3937_04108 (Hassan et al. 2013). Row mislabeled and points to wrong DOI; pelN duplicates pelZ entry.

DOI:DOI does not resolve; not present in Annu Rev Microbiol volume 70 (2016) which uses prefix annurev-micro-102215. Citation is broken/fabricated. | BIOLOGY: PrtA/B/C/G are secreted via the PrtDEF Type I secretion system in Dickeya, NOT the Out T2SS. Misassigned to T2SS.

DOI:DOI does not resolve. The actual DuMont/Karaba/Cianciotto 2015 StmPr1/StmPr2 T2SS paper is 10.1128/IAI.00672-15. Citation is wrong. | UniProt:B2FQ52 maps to Smlt0913 (rplP 50S ribosomal L16), NOT Smlt0177 stmPr2. UniProt ID wrong.

DOI:DOI does not resolve. The actual DuMont/Karaba/Cianciotto 2015 StmPr1/StmPr2 T2SS paper is 10.1128/IAI.00672-15. Citation is wrong. | UniProt:B2FT85 maps to Smlt0007 (M48 metalloprotease), NOT Smlt1334 stmPr3. UniProt ID wrong.

DOI:DOI does not resolve. The Kooi/Corbett/Sokol 2005 ZmpA paper is 10.1128/JB.187.13.4421-4429.2005 (J Bacteriol). Citation is wrong. | UniProt:B4EAE2 maps to BCAL1843 (ybiT ABC transporter), NOT BCAL0916 zmpB. UniProt ID wrong.
TseV nomenclature less established in literature; PA0822 may be associated with PAAR3 cluster but H1 assignment unverified; DOI 10.1126/sciadv.aav0024 (Sci Adv 2019 paywalled, can't fully verify)

DOI 10.1101/2024.11.27.625605 is a preprint about Serratia Ssp4 pore-forming effectors, not Burkholderia. BTH_II2127 is on chromosome II, NOT in T6SS-1 (which is on chr I). Wrong organism + wrong cluster
STRUCTURAL: Hcp listed as effector. LOCUS: UniProt Q9KNE6 at VC_A0019 is VasW (accessory protein), NOT Hcp-2. Hcp-2 is at VC_A0017 (different locus). Wrong UniProt and wrong locus_tag
Santoriello 2020 bioRxiv (10.1101/2020.07.07.192401) describes Aux4 effectors. TpeV nomenclature/locus_tag not specified. Cannot verify without locus
Crisan 2019 BMC Microbiol (10.1186/s12866-019-1568-6) characterizes TleV1 as Aux5 effector in environmental V. cholerae; locus_tag missing
Tde1 anti-fungal A. baumannii (mbio.03420-22) — anti-fungal Tde-family effectors are reported but locus_tag missing; organism is generic 'A. baumannii' not strain-specific
Pyocin-like delivery via T6SS in Y. pseudotuberculosis; locus_tag missing
